name: Savory Grilled Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix salad dressing and seasonings until well blended.
2. Stir in the potatoes and onions to coat them evenly.
3. Divide the potato mixture evenly among six 12-inch square pieces of heavy duty foil.
4. Seal each foil packet securely.
5. Place the foil packets on the grill over medium-hot coals (coals should have a slight glow).
6. Grill, covered, for 25-30 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
